name: lynxhub
description: Cross-platform, extensible terminal/browser for AI management

appDetails.title: LynxHub
appDetails.detailedDescription: Open-source, cross-platform terminal and browser, designed for managing AI. Highly modular and extensible, it's the all-in-one environment for AI power users.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.validate:web: npm run fix-linter:web && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.validate:node: npm run fix-linter:node && npm run typecheck:node
scripts.validate:ext: npm run fix-linter-ext && npm run typecheck
scripts.validate: npm run fix-linter && npm run typecheck
scripts.build:extension: rimraf extension_out && electron-vite build --config extension/electron.vite.config.ts && npm run removeDotExtension
scripts.build:module: rimraf module_out && npx --prefix module rolldown --config module/rolldown.config.mjs
scripts.build:win_x64: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder_x64.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:win_arm: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder_arm.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:win_portable_x64: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder-portable_x64.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:win_portable_arm: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder-portable_arm.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:linux_x64: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder_x64.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:linux_arm: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder_arm.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:linux_portable_x64: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder-portable_x64.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:linux_portable_arm: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder-portable_arm.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:mac_x64: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder_x64.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:mac_arm: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder_arm.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:linux-test: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder-test.config.cjs --publish never
